feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to use material valuation type C1 in work order iw32
entry.content:
hello,

I have two materials with the same number but one has an empty valuation type with price A and the other has a valuation type C1 with price B, I input the material in iw32 but the price recorded from material valuation type empty.

What should I do, so i can input material in iw32 that get  price from material valuation C1

Thank You

entry.title: Creating a person responsible in S/4HANA to assign in maintenance Order in IW32
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created maintenance order in S/4HANA IDES system and want to assign person responsible in the order and I am not able to get any person responsible in the list. How to create person responsible so that it appears in the list and I can assign. 

Thanks and Regards

KVKUMAR

entry.title: I am facing issue for equipment plant transfer scenario
entry.content:
One Super Equipment is having four Sub equipment. One user changed the maintenance Plant, Maintenance Planning plant and Cost center accordingly. After change, Maintenance plant of all subordinate equipment found changed but two equipment Maintenance planning plant and cost center found unchanged . These two has to be centrally changed as other two equipment.

Any one pl help me to check which config setting for that issue.

entry.title: Stop creation of maintenance work order
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to stop create the work orders to all the equipments under a functional location.

There are 03 things we can inactivate, inactivate equipment, inactive functional location, inactive maintenance plans related to those equipments.

What is the better approach to stop the creation of maintenance work orders for this scenario.

Should I go on inactivate individual maintenance plans, should I go on inactivate each equipment under that functional location or should I just inactive the functional location?

entry.title: Usage and differences between MRS , RSH and FSM
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working on a requirement for  Resource Scheduling for one of our client.

SAP has 3 products available i.e. MRS , FSM and RSH.

Can someone tell me what are the usages of those and the differences between them? 

Thanks and Regards,

S Kumar

entry.title: Maintenance Order Complete window not showing Completion Date fields
entry.content:
Hi,

While doing TECO against a Maintenance Order created automatically from a Plan, the Completion Date and Time fields are not appearing on top right as shown below:

When I access my other system, it shows as follows:

What configurations am i missing in the other system since these fields are standard fields and in both cases Orders generated directly from Maintenance Plans.

Thanking in advance

BR

entry.title: Does integration exist between SAP CRM and SAP ERP (ECC6 EHP8) Plant Maintenance?
entry.content:
Hi experts

Is there any SAP standard integration from SAP CRM service requests to SAP ERP PM work orders?

If so, where is the configuration found?

entry.title: Ways to enhance IH01
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to add additional fields in IH01. I want to add object link field in IH01 and IH03.

Thanks & Regards,

Preethi Alevarthi.

entry.title: Object Link in IH01
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please let us know on how to add fields of object link in IH01 Structure and how to activate the menu option for the additional fields in a standard way.

Thanks,

Preethi.

entry.title: Change System Status in PM order dependend to order Type
entry.content:
Hello guys,

we have a problem with auto releasing (system status REL) PM orders. It works totally fine with one order type but with the other one not.

Both order types have the setting in SPRO "release immediately"! Now on the SAP help page its written that several points are going to be checked by the system before the REL status can be set:

  • Availability check of components
  • Authorization
  • Billing rule
  • consistency check of user Status
  • Userexits

--> There are no components in the example

--> I checked with the same user so authorization should not be a thing (same for billing rule and user status?)

--> I tried to change the system status in user exit ZXWOCU07 via ABAP. But that change will later somehow be overwritten again.

 

Any ideas?

entry.title: OCI Config Update
entry.content:
We are using OCI catalogues and we have to maintain procurement outline agreement in below configuration in HTML Field and HTML Value for NEW_ITEM-CONTRACT and NEW_ITEM-CONTRACT_ITEM. 

SPRO > SAP Ref. IMG – Plant Maintenance and Customer Service - Maintenance and Service Processing - Maintenance and Service Orders - Interface for Procurement Using Catalogs (OCI) - Convert HTML Field Values

Could you please suggest any way or standard application to maintain this directly without transport request or client open. 
This is very frequent activity in case of master data change and very tedious to do by transports. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: is there field for equipment number in P.R and P.O screen in MM
entry.content:
is there field for equipment number in P.R and P.O screen in MM 

My customer needs to have a reports for all purchased spare parts and services for an equipment

entry.title: Need to schedule a maintenance order on particular date of the month
entry.content:
Need to schedule a maintenance order on particular date of the month like 6th and 21st which should have completion requirement.

I tried creating a factory calender with only 6th and 21st as work days. yet while i schedule the order i get the below error.

Calculated date is after end of factory calendar ZZ; maintenance plan 263 Message no. IP733

entry.title: Functional Location Edit Mask
entry.content:
Hello,

Our Functional Location edit mask is XX-XXXX-XXX. However, in some cases second hierarchy has only 3 characters (Ex: US-ABC-XYZ) and in most of the cases second level hierarchy has 4 characters inline with edit mast (Ex: US-ABCD-WVX). Is it possible to achieve both variations with same edit mask? 

 

Thanks

entry.title: DIEN or Service masters?
entry.content:
Hi!

We already use the material DIEN (ZDIEN for purchasing) to process services.
We are now planning to start using PM orders.
What are the risks if we continue to use DIEN instead of the service masters?
What is the best practice?

Thanks.

entry.title: User status update in Equipment Master based on Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to auto update the equipment master user status to In Maintenance if any work order/Notification generate. And status should set back to Available once all open Orders  closed.

Can you please share the best way to get this change in the system? Also share any difficulties to take a note handle in this change ?

Best Regards,

Sandy

entry.title: Tables and Fields that build the IW13
entry.content: Can anyone help with identifying the tables and joined fields that build the IW13 (Material Where Used) report?

entry.title: PM order print issue with 2023 upgrade
entry.content:
Previous we are using S4 HANA 2019, with Tcode IW3D (print Maintenance order) shopfloor papers used to be printed. With upgraded to 2023, system is checking for OPD setting instead of shopfloor setting. Is there any setting to change back to shopfloor papers instead of OPD? 

S4 HANA 2023

S4 Hana 2019

Regards, 

Varma

entry.title: Creating BOM with new Usage instead of Usage 'S' within Table STZU
entry.content:
When creating a Task List via IA05, a Material is added to an Operation which creates a BOM in the background.
When you check Table STZU, the 'Usage' is maintained as '4' (Plant Maintenance).
How-To configure this to be another (new) Usage-Type  instead of '4' (Plant Maintenance)?

It has BOM-Type S, can it be linked with this Type?

entry.title: Can i have the SAP transaction to check 7500 equipments maintenance package tick mark verification?
entry.content: We have more than 7500 equipment's in SAP.  How to quickly verify, all the equipment's maintenance package having the tick mark.  Can i have the SAP transaction code?
